specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicaid data, for having Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy Values:
0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
HYPPLA_MEDICARE Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia Indicator - Medicare-Only Data NUM 1 This code specifies whether the enrollee met the chronic condition algorithm criteria, considering only Medicare data, for having Benign Prostatic Hypertrophy
